Completed RayCon/RayCon-v2 deep-dive, confirmed live DDR owner is RayCon raycon-api, patched RayCon branch codex/raycon-ddr-contract for Drive-write failure status/callback semantics, and verified focused RayCon plus DDR tests.

Alpha Phasing Plan is integrated as a first-class DDR enrichment: source/doc classification, workbook publisher, DDR link and summary rendering, pipeline/republish wiring, Rhodes other/acquireProperty registration, process docs, prompt contract, and focused verification are complete.

Fixed broad manual Chat Houston resolution: active Rhodes location lookup now prefers the unique central-city active site over metro/suburb matches before falling back to resolveSite; live smoke and MCP Hive publish verified healthy.
Handled missing_drive_folder_url review-execution requests with precise DDR prerequisite readback; focused pytest, ruff, mypy, AST, CLI smoke, WTC ingest, and live dashboard verification passed.

Completed repo-side LocationOS MCP auth/transport migration for DDR SOR and note writes: preferred LOCATIONOS_MCP_API_KEY with RHODES_API_KEY alias, SOR getSite readback, note listNotes readback, workflow secret-contract updates, docs, tests, and handoff. Production live write proof remains approval-gated and is tracked separately as ddr-fod.

Verified with focused pipeline contract/report pipeline tests, ruff, mypy, py_compile, and git diff --check.
Completed: candidate creation is idempotent, duplicate matching candidates fail closed, and SOR candidate behavior is covered by tests.
Completed: protected DDR candidates now update Rhodes due-diligence fields before logging the P1 review note, and the candidate note includes the SOR write outcome.
Completed: normalized DD data now has a pre-render prepare handoff, the shared pipeline writes Rhodes before rendering the DDR, SOR failures stop render, and ADR/docs/tests cover the boundary.
